allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.read\(\).strip\(\).split\('\\n'\) for line in lines[-30:]: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) role = obj.get\('role',''\) if role == 'user': content = obj.get\('content',''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\(f'USER: {c[\\"text\\"][:500]}'\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(f'USER: {content[:500]}'\) elif role == 'assistant': content = obj.get\('content',''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\(f'ASSISTANT: {c[\\"text\\"][:500]}'\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: line = line.strip\(\) if not line: continue try: obj = json.loads\(line\) role = obj.get\('role',''\) content = obj.get\('content',''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c,dict\) and c.get\('type'\)=='text': print\(role.upper\(\)+':', c['text'][:800]\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(role.upper\(\)+':', content[:800]\) except: pass ")
